mapper.select:
SELECT AI.ITEM_ID, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(AI.ITEM_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS ITEM_NAME FROM AR_ITEM AI WHERE AI.ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL AND AI.ACTIVITY = 1
AND AI.ITEM_GROUP_CODE != '1433'
AND AI.ITEM_GROUP_CODE = '1433'
ORDER BY AI.ITEM_ID

SELECT AI.ITEM_ID FROM AR_ITEM AI WHERE AI.ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL AND AI.ACTIVITY = 1
AND AI.ITEM_GROUP_CODE != '1433'
AND AI.ITEM_GROUP_CODE = '1433'
ORDER BY AI.ITEM_ID
